result.stdout:
Artemis.Tools.PluginUploader v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet Artemis.Tools.PluginUploader.dll [options]
  dotnet Artemis.Tools.PluginUploader.dll [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  upload            Uploads a single plugin 
  upload-all        Uploads all plugins in a solution 

You can run `dotnet Artemis.Tools.PluginUploader.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Artemis.Tools.PluginUploader v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet Artemis.Tools.PluginUploader.dll upload --pat <value> --folder <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Uploads a single plugin

OPTIONS
* -p|--pat          Personal Access Token 
* -f|--folder       Folder to the compiled plugin. Should contain a plugin.json 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
